languages.text: Следуя своему Поиску знания, генетор Фебрус проводит серию научных изысканий в Секторе Бионика. Вольному Торговцу поступило предложение поучаствовать в таинстве, исполняя роль доверенного ассистента Эоганна.

Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.
languages.original_text: Следуя своему Поиску знания, генетор Фебрус проводит серию научных изысканий в Секторе Бионика. Вольному Торговцу поступило предложение поучаствовать в таинстве, исполняя роль доверенного ассистента Эоганна.

traits.locale_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific research in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

languages.text: Auf seiner Suche nach Wissen führt Genetor Februs in Sektor Bionica eine Reihe wissenschaftlicher Untersuchungen durch. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Einladung erhalten, Eogunn während des Rituals zu assistieren.
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

traits.locale_text: Auf seiner Suche nach Wissen führt Genetor Februs in Sektor Bionica eine Reihe wissenschaftlicher Untersuchungen durch. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Einladung erhalten, Eogunn während des Rituals zu assistieren.

languages.text: Poursuivant sa Quête de la Connaissance, le genetor Februs mène une série d'études scientifiques dans le secteur Bionica. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a été {mf|invité|invitée} à prendre part au rituel en tant que fidèle {mf|assistant|assistante} d'Eogunn.
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

traits.locale_text: Poursuivant sa Quête de la Connaissance, le genetor Februs mène une série d'études scientifiques dans le secteur Bionica. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a été {mf|invité|invitée} à prendre part au rituel en tant que fidèle {mf|assistant|assistante} d'Eogunn.

languages.text: 为了推进他的求知远征，基因士费布鲁斯正在仿生区进行一系列科学研究。行商浪人收到邀请，届时可参与这场仪式，担任伊奥贡信赖的助手。
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

traits.locale_text: 为了推进他的求知远征，基因士费布鲁斯正在仿生区进行一系列科学研究。行商浪人收到邀请，届时可参与这场仪式，担任伊奥贡信赖的助手。

languages.text: Durante su búsqueda del conocimiento, el genetor Februs está llevando a cabo una serie de estudios en el Sector Bionica. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha recibido una invitación a cooperar en el rito en calidad de ayudante de confianza de Eogunn.
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

traits.locale_text: Durante su búsqueda del conocimiento, el genetor Februs está llevando a cabo una serie de estudios en el Sector Bionica. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha recibido una invitación a cooperar en el rito en calidad de ayudante de confianza de Eogunn.

languages.text: 知識の探求を続けるジェネター・フェブリュスは、セクター・バイオニカで一連の科学調査を行っている。ローグ・トレーダーは、エオグンの信頼できる助手として儀式に参加するオファーを受けた。
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.

languages.text: Genetör Februs, İrfan Arayışı peşinde Sektör Biyonika'da bir dizi bilimsel araştırma yürütüyor. Hür Tacir'e, Eogunn'un güvenilir asistanı olarak ayine katılması teklif edildi.
languages.original_text: Pursuing his Quest for Knowledge, Genetor Februs is conducting a series of scientific investigations in the Sector Bionica. The Rogue Trader has received an offer to take part in the rite, serving as Eogunn's trusted assistant.
